title: AER-Skills: an identification-first agent skill stack for top-5 economics manuscripts
description: A fifteen-skill agent bundle covering the full American Economic Review manuscript lifecycle - topic selection, literature positioning with citation verification, causal identification, experimental pre-registration with power/MDE sizing, referee-anticipating robustness, body-section drafting, introductions, tables and figures, full-manuscript consistency audits, adversarial referee simulation, AEA-compliant replication packages, submission preflight, and R&R rebuttals - with machine-enforced quality gates: numeric-correctness contracts on every runnable demo, Crossref-grounded citation verification, validated tool bindings, referee-verdict calibration, and a unit-tested validation toolchain, all enforced in continuous integration.
